text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka hasn't come to today's training
session. I decide to go search for her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The long and agitated groan I hear is coming from
Silence Suzuka. I find her distressed, pacing
around in counterclockwise circles.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Just how am I going to manage?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I have an English test tomorrow. I've been warned
about my poor grades recently...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
So, I was wondering if there was a way to study
for the test while I run...
choice_data_list: You know training's already started, right?
You know training's already started, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She looks genuinely surprised. I tell her to
prioritize her studies today.
